JobScope.description: Job history scope. Default profile returns only the selected/active rTorrent profile. global is admin-only diagnostics and affects all visible job rows.
JobScope.name: scope

ProfileId.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for profile-scoped API operations. Profile-scoped write requests must provide profile_id in query, form data or JSON body.
ProfileId.name: profile_id

Refresh.description: When set to 1/true/yes/force, /api/torrents attempts a fresh rTorrent refresh before returning data. This is honored only when Poller setting allow_api_force_refresh is enabled. Without this flag, /api/torrents is cache-first and refreshes only when the cache is older than api_cache_max_age_seconds.
Refresh.name: refresh

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

event_type.description: Optional event type filter. Empty clears all active-profile operation logs.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

default_max_dirs.description: Default number of directories returned before the user explicitly requests all results.

effective_search.description: Search query actually applied after minimum-length validation.

empty_check_skipped.description: True when per-directory empty checks were skipped for performance. Rename checks are then performed lazily for one clicked directory.

hard_max_dirs.description: Safety cap for all-results directory listings.

listing_cache_ttl_seconds.description: How long, normally 900 seconds, the backend may reuse the current folder listing for search, show-all and cache refresh checks.

listing_cached.description: True when the response used the short-lived cached first-level directory listing.

matched_dir_count.description: Number of directories matching search when a search query is provided.

search.description: Case-insensitive query filtered against the cached first-level directory listing, not a separate remote filesystem scan.

search_timed_out.description: False for the current cached-listing implementation; remote browse commands no longer use an internal max-seconds timeout.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

can_rename.description: True when the directory can be renamed now. Null means the empty-state check was skipped during fast browse and must be checked lazily.

empty.description: Whether the directory is empty. Null means not checked during large-directory fast browse.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

default_download_path.description: User-level default download path. Empty value falls back to the active rTorrent profile default.

download_last_path.description: Last download location selected by the user.

download_location_mode.description: How the Add torrent dialog chooses its save location.

download_remember_last_enabled.description: Whether the Add torrent dialog should remember the last selected location.

drop_location_mode.description: How drag-and-drop torrent uploads choose their save location.

free_space_check_enabled.description: When enabled, free space is checked before queueing torrent files.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

reverse_dns_enabled.description: Enables cached reverse DNS lookups for the Peers tab.

sidebar_labels_expanded.description: Stores whether the sidebar label group is expanded for the active profile.

sidebar_shortcuts_expanded.description: Stores whether the sidebar keyboard shortcut help is expanded for the active profile.

table_columns_json.description: JSON-encoded TableColumnsPreference stored in user preferences.

is_remote.description: When true, CPU/RAM host usage is hidden; public IP checks try remote rTorrent commands when supported.

max_parallel_jobs.description: Maximum queued jobs that may run at once for this rTorrent. Move/remove jobs keep request order.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

ignore_seed_peer.description: When enabled, seed and peer counts are ignored by the stalled timer.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

down.description: Download limit in bytes per second; 0 means unlimited.

up.description: Upload limit in bytes per second; 0 means unlimited.

down.description: Download limit in bytes per second; 0 means unlimited.

up.description: Upload limit in bytes per second; 0 means unlimited.

TableColumnWidths.description: Column widths in pixels keyed by column id.

TableColumnsPreference.description: Torrent table column visibility and width preferences for desktop and mobile.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

count.description: Number of torrents in this filter.

disk_bytes.description: Completed bytes reported by rTorrent; used as the displayed Data value.

down_total.description: Backward compatibility field; not used by the filters UI.

size.description: Total torrent payload size in bytes.

up_total.description: Backward compatibility field; not used by the filters UI.

cache_age_seconds.description: Age in seconds of the in-memory torrent cache used to build this response.

profile_id.description: rTorrent profile id used for this response.

host.description: Reverse DNS PTR hostname when reverse_dns_enabled is enabled and a hostname is cached or resolved.

host_pending.description: True when a lightweight background PTR lookup was started but did not finish within the request budget.

TorrentRefreshMeta.description: Metadata describing whether /api/torrents refreshed the cache or served a fresh-enough cached snapshot.

age_seconds.description: Cache age at the time refresh was skipped or measured.

skipped.description: True when refresh was skipped because the cached snapshot was still fresh enough.

generated_at_epoch.description: Unix timestamp when summary was generated.

apiKeyAuth.description: Optional per-user API token. Tokens are accepted only when PYTORRENT_AUTH_ENABLE=1. When auth is disabled, API endpoints do not require credentials.
apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

bearerApiToken.description: Optional per-user API token in Authorization: Bearer <token>. Tokens are accepted only when PYTORRENT_AUTH_ENABLE=1.

sessionCookie.description: Optional Flask session cookie. Required only when PYTORRENT_AUTH_ENABLE=1 and no API token is used.
sessionCookie.name: session

get.description: Available only when application authentication is enabled. Admins can list any user tokens; regular users can list their own tokens. Token secrets are never returned.
get.summary: List API tokens for a user

post.description: Available only when application authentication is enabled. The returned token is shown once and must be copied immediately.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

post.summary: Generate API token for a user

delete.description: Available only when application authentication is enabled. Revoked tokens stop working immediately.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

post.description: Creates an application-level backup for admin users. Note: this endpoint is additive and does not change the legacy /api/backup behavior.
Creates a backup for the currently active rTorrent profile. Note: this endpoint keeps application-level backups separate from profile backups.

get.description: Returns automatic backup settings for the active profile. Note: this mirrors the profile-scoped backup UI controls.

post.description: Saves automatic backup settings for the active profile. Note: application backup settings remain unchanged.

Clears finished job logs, Smart Queue history, active-profile operation logs, Planner action history and automation history for the selected/active profile. Pending/running jobs, saved rules, settings and torrents are preserved.
Clears active profile runtime and database-backed caches without deleting torrents, settings, rules or logs.
Runs SQLite database vacuum/maintenance for admin users. Note: the cleanup summary is returned with the result.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

post.description: Deletes done/failed/cancelled job history only for the selected/active rTorrent profile. Pending/running jobs are preserved.
post.summary: Clear finished job history for the active profile

post.description: Clears active-profile operation logs. Torrents, jobs, settings and rules are preserved.
Deletes Download Planner action history for the active profile. Saved Planner settings are preserved.
Clears in-memory poller runtime counters for the active profile. Note: polling settings and torrent state are preserved.

profile_id.description: Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.
Explicit rTorrent profile id for this profile-scoped request.

delete.description: Deletes Download Planner action history for the active profile. Saved Planner settings are preserved.

get.description: Preview matching planner rule and next action.

parameters.description: Number of Planner history rows to return.
parameters.name: history_limit

get.description: Lists job history for the selected/active profile by default. Admins may pass scope=global for diagnostics.

post.description: Deletes finished jobs for the selected/active profile by default. Admins may pass scope=global to clear finished jobs across every profile, and force=true for emergency cleanup including unfinished jobs.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: When true, profile emergency cleanup also cancels and deletes pending/running jobs. With scope=global this is admin-only and applies to every profile.

post.summary: Force pending job to run next

get.description: Lists active-profile operation logs with filters, retention settings and statistics.

post.description: Runs retention cleanup for active-profile operation logs.
Clears active-profile operation logs, optionally limited to one event type.
Saves active-profile operation log retention and applies it immediately.

get.description: Lists directories that the rTorrent process can enter and read through rTorrent RPC. The remote browse command does one first-level listing without per-folder empty checks or an internal max-seconds timeout. Completed listings are cached for 15 minutes; search, show-all and cache-only refresh filter that cached list instead of starting another remote filesystem scan.

parameters.description: Case-insensitive folder-name search filtered against the cached first-level listing for the current folder. Requires at least 2 characters.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Maximum number of matching directories to return. Use 0 with all=1 to request all results up to the hard safety cap.
parameters.name: max_dirs

parameters.description: When true, returns the cached first-level listing up to the hard safety cap. Empty-state checks are still skipped for large listings and performed lazily on rename click.
parameters.name: all

parameters.description: When true, return only a cached listing if one is already available. This never starts a new rTorrent filesystem browse command and is used by the UI refresh button after a long-running browse notice.
parameters.name: cache_only

post.description: Creates a directory on the active rTorrent host for inline path-picker use. Existing torrent state is not changed.
Checks one selected remote directory for inline rename. Used after fast browse skips mass empty-state checks on large or slow directories.
post.summary: Check whether a directory can be renamed

post.description: Renames a directory only when it is empty and does not contain a cached torrent path.

get.description: Return profile-scoped polling/cache settings and runtime poller status.

post.description: Save profile-scoped polling/cache settings, including API cache age and force-refresh behaviour.

get.summary: Read cached incoming port check status

post.summary: Run incoming port check immediately, bypassing cache

get.description: Returns the startup-computed hash for app JavaScript and CSS assets. The value is kept in memory and returned without scanning static files per request.

static_hash.description: Short SHA-256-based hash of frontend JavaScript and CSS files computed once at app startup.

version.description: Alias of static_hash for simple client version checks.

get.description: For remote profiles CPU/RAM host usage is not returned and usage_available is false.

Returns the current cached torrent snapshot. By default the endpoint avoids expensive rTorrent calls and refreshes only when the cache is older than the Poller setting api_cache_max_age_seconds. Use refresh=1 to request a forced refresh when allow_api_force_refresh is enabled.

200.description: Torrent list with cached filter summary

post.description: For move, path is the target directory; move_data=true physically moves data on the rTorrent host using a detached shell move with status polling. recreate_files stops/closes the torrent, removes existing data files on the rTorrent host, queues rTorrent per-file create/resize flags with value 1, runs d.check_hash, then restores the previous running state. Large move/remove/profile-transfer/recreate-files selections are split into ordered bulk parts of up to 100 hashes.
